Dedicated Service Page

EV Charger Installation in Ontario

Professional Home and Commercial EV Charger Installation

We provide professional EV charger installation services for homeowners and businesses. Whether you drive a Tesla, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Chevrolet, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, or any other electric vehicle, we can install a safe and reliable Level 2 charging solution.

Services Included

  • Tesla Wall Connector Installation
  • Level 2 EV Charger Installation
  • Dedicated Circuit Installation
  • Electrical Panel Assessment
  • Panel Upgrades if Required
  • Indoor Charger Installation
  • Outdoor Charger Installation
  • Permit and Code-Compliant Installation

Why Install a Level 2 Charger?

  • Faster Charging
  • Greater Convenience
  • Increased Property Value
  • Improved Energy Efficiency
  • Safe and Reliable Home Charging
